title: perymenium buphthalmoides var. diguetii
intro: Perymenium buphthalmoides var. diguetii, also known as the Mexican perymenium, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Perymenium buphthalmoides var. diguetii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
